creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
For months security/scamp can no longer fetch/update/verify clamav signatures (besides of mbl.ndb) and the bash script contains url(s) that is/are no longer available (e.g: http://clamav.securiteinfo.com/). I get the following errors:

curl: (6) Could not resolve host: clamav.securiteinfo.com                                                                                                                 
Security Error blurl.ndb is missing gpg sig                                                                                                                               
gpg: Signature made Fri Aug 28 21:09:55 2020 CEST                                                                                                                         
gpg:                using DSA key D691DED931EA4D9E                                   
gpg: Can't check signature: No public key
[...]

Is the port obsolete and should it be removed? The SF page (https://sourceforge.net/projects/scamp/) says: Last Update: 2013-05-02.
